# Anomaly Detection Examples

This folder organizes anomaly detection as a progression of modeling ideas. The intention is to help the reader study the families in a useful order: start with simple baselines, then move to residual models, supervised approaches, clustering, ensembles, and deep architectures.

If you are learning the area, do not treat this as a flat catalog. The groups below were ordered to make comparisons easier.

## Foundations

- [01-baseline-hanr_histogram.md](/examples/anomalies/01-baseline-hanr_histogram.md) - `hanr_histogram()`: simple baseline based on low-density histogram bins.

## Residual and Signal Models

- [02-regression-hanr_arima.md](/examples/anomalies/02-regression-hanr_arima.md) - `hanr_arima()`: anomaly detection from ARIMA residuals.
- [03-regression-hanr_fbiad.md](/examples/anomalies/03-regression-hanr_fbiad.md) - `hanr_fbiad()`: forecasting-based anomaly detection.
- [04-regression-hanr_emd.md](/examples/anomalies/04-regression-hanr_emd.md) - `hanr_emd()`: decomposition-based anomaly detection.
- [05-regression-hanr_fft.md](/examples/anomalies/05-regression-hanr_fft.md) - `hanr_fft()`: spectral modeling for anomaly detection.
- [06-regression-hanr_fft_amoc.md](/examples/anomalies/06-regression-hanr_fft_amoc.md) - `hanr_fft_amoc()`: FFT residual analysis combined with AMOC.
- [07-regression-hanr_fft_amoc_cusum.md](/examples/anomalies/07-regression-hanr_fft_amoc_cusum.md) - `hanr_fft_amoc_cusum()`: FFT, AMOC, and CUSUM in sequence.
- [08-regression-hanr_fft_binseg.md](/examples/anomalies/08-regression-hanr_fft_binseg.md) - `hanr_fft_binseg()`: FFT residual analysis with binary segmentation.
- [09-regression-hanr_fft_binseg_cusum.md](/examples/anomalies/09-regression-hanr_fft_binseg_cusum.md) - `hanr_fft_binseg_cusum()`: FFT, binary segmentation, and CUSUM.
- [10-regression-hanr_fft_sma.md](/examples/anomalies/10-regression-hanr_fft_sma.md) - `hanr_fft_sma()`: FFT residual analysis with smoothing.
- [11-regression-hanr_garch.md](/examples/anomalies/11-regression-hanr_garch.md) - `hanr_garch()`: volatility-aware anomaly detection.
- [12-regression-hanr_remd.md](/examples/anomalies/12-regression-hanr_remd.md) - `hanr_remd()`: robust empirical mode decomposition workflow.
- [13-regression-hanr_rtad.md](/examples/anomalies/13-regression-hanr_rtad.md) - `hanr_rtad()`: residual time-series anomaly detection.
- [14-regression-hanr_wavelet.md](/examples/anomalies/14-regression-hanr_wavelet.md) - `hanr_wavelet()`: wavelet-based anomaly detection.

## Supervised Detectors

- [15-regression-ml-hanr_ml_elm.md](/examples/anomalies/15-regression-ml-hanr_ml_elm.md) - regression-based anomaly detection with ELM.
- [16-regression-ml-hanr_ml_mlp.md](/examples/anomalies/16-regression-ml-hanr_ml_mlp.md) - regression-based anomaly detection with MLP.
- [17-regression-ml-hanr_ml_rf.md](/examples/anomalies/17-regression-ml-hanr_ml_rf.md) - regression-based anomaly detection with Random Forest.
- [18-regression-ml-hanr_ml_svm.md](/examples/anomalies/18-regression-ml-hanr_ml_svm.md) - regression-based anomaly detection with SVM.
- [19-regression-ml-hanr_ml_lstm.md](/examples/anomalies/19-regression-ml-hanr_ml_lstm.md) - regression-based anomaly detection with LSTM.
- [20-regression-ml-hanr_ml_conv1d.md](/examples/anomalies/20-regression-ml-hanr_ml_conv1d.md) - regression-based anomaly detection with Conv1D.
- [21-classification-hanc_ml_majority.md](/examples/anomalies/21-classification-hanc_ml_majority.md) - classification baseline with majority class.
- [22-classification-hanc_ml_dtree.md](/examples/anomalies/22-classification-hanc_ml_dtree.md) - classification detector with decision trees.
- [23-classification-hanc_ml_knn.md](/examples/anomalies/23-classification-hanc_ml_knn.md) - classification detector with k-NN.
- [24-classification-hanc_ml_nb.md](/examples/anomalies/24-classification-hanc_ml_nb.md) - classification detector with Naive Bayes.
- [25-classification-hanc_ml_rf.md](/examples/anomalies/25-classification-hanc_ml_rf.md) - classification detector with Random Forest.
- [26-classification-hanc_ml_svm.md](/examples/anomalies/26-classification-hanc_ml_svm.md) - classification detector with SVM.
- [27-classification-hanc_ml_mlp.md](/examples/anomalies/27-classification-hanc_ml_mlp.md) - classification detector with MLP.

## Clustering and Discords

- [28-clustering-hanct_kmeans_anomaly.md](/examples/anomalies/28-clustering-hanct_kmeans_anomaly.md) - clustering-based anomaly detection with k-means.
- [29-clustering-hanct_kmeans_discord.md](/examples/anomalies/29-clustering-hanct_kmeans_discord.md) - discord-oriented k-means workflow.
- [30-clustering-hanct_dtw_anomaly.md](/examples/anomalies/30-clustering-hanct_dtw_anomaly.md) - anomaly detection with DTW clustering.
- [31-clustering-hanct_dtw_discord.md](/examples/anomalies/31-clustering-hanct_dtw_discord.md) - discord discovery with DTW clustering.

## Ensembles and Deep Models

- [32-ensemble-hanr_ensemble.md](/examples/anomalies/32-ensemble-hanr_ensemble.md) - ensemble detector that combines multiple anomaly scores.
- [33-ensemble-hanr_ensemble_fuzzy.md](/examples/anomalies/33-ensemble-hanr_ensemble_fuzzy.md) - ensemble detector with temporal fuzzification.
- [34-autoencoder-han_autoenc_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/34-autoencoder-han_autoenc_ed.md) - basic autoencoder for reconstruction-based anomaly detection.
- [35-autoencoder-han_autoenc_denoise_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/35-autoencoder-han_autoenc_denoise_ed.md) - denoising autoencoder.
- [36-autoencoder-han_autoenc_conv_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/36-autoencoder-han_autoenc_conv_ed.md) - convolutional autoencoder.
- [37-autoencoder-han_autoenc_lstm_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/37-autoencoder-han_autoenc_lstm_ed.md) - LSTM autoencoder.
- [38-autoencoder-han_autoenc_stacked_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/38-autoencoder-han_autoenc_stacked_ed.md) - stacked autoencoder.
- [39-autoencoder-han_autoenc_variational_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/39-autoencoder-han_autoenc_variational_ed.md) - variational autoencoder.
- [40-autoencoder-han_autoenc_adv_ed.md](/examples/anomalies/40-autoencoder-han_autoenc_adv_ed.md) - adversarial autoencoder.

## Multivariate Analysis

- [41-multivariate-hmu_pca.md](/examples/anomalies/41-multivariate-hmu_pca.md) - PCA-based anomaly detection for multivariate time series.
